qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authentication Bypass via Hardcoded JWT Secret
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns JWT token forgery through a hardcoded secret in jwt-helper.js, not the project import path or unsandboxed imported project scripts described by the advisory.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path Traversal in File Upload Endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns the /api/upload destination path traversal and arbitrary file write behavior, not project import of scripts or the script sandboxing failure described by the advisory.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Script Execution Remote Code Execution in FUXA SCADA
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding reaches unsandboxed script execution through /api/runscript test mode, but it does not identify the advisory-described project import source path or imported-project script flow.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described FUXA project import root cause: imported project files carrying user-supplied scripts that are not properly sanitized or sandboxed. The qualifying findings cover a hardcoded JWT secret, /api/upload path traversal, and direct /api/runscript execution, which are separate source paths or mechanisms.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-5r63-q8hg-p8qx describes RCE via project import functionality and unsandboxed user-supplied scripts within imported project files.
The session manifest lists three final qualifying findings: authentication_bypass, path_traversal_file_upload, and script_execution_rce.
authentication_bypass targets server/api/jwt-helper.js hardcoded JWT secret token forgery.
path_traversal_file_upload targets the /api/upload destination parameter and arbitrary file write behavior.
script_execution_rce targets direct POST /api/runscript test-mode execution and does not identify the project import flow from imported project content.
